creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
OK, I've removed MAGICDIR and updated to 0.11.5. I'm a bit reluctant to
test it due to big number of dependencies. Based on `diff -urNd' there
shouldn't be any new ones.

Looks like I've missed `portlint -C' that reports a few more warns:

  WARN: /a/freebsd-ports/audio/jokosher/pkg-plist: [256]: installing gettext translation files, please define USE_GETTEXT as appropriate
  ...
  WARN: /a/freebsd-ports/audio/jokosher/pkg-plist: [305]: installing OMF files, please define INSTALLS_OMF (see the FreeBSD GNOME porting guide at http://www.FreeBSD.org/gnome/docs/porting.html for more details)

I'm not gonna fix the first one because the port doesn't depend on
gettext lib directly rather it relies on python interface. Our python
doesn't use gettext anyway, cf. ports/136917 and forcing devel/gettext
on users will not fix it.

The second one is another false positive.

The only portlint warn I'll not fix is this one:

  WARN: Makefile: only one MASTER_SITE configured.  Consider adding additional mirrors.

--- jokosher.diff begins here ---
Index: audio/Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /a/.cvsup/ports/audio/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.1103
diff -u -p -r1.1103 Makefile
--- audio/Makefile	2 May 2010 10:45:35 -0000	1.1103
+++ audio/Makefile	3 May 2010 09:55:08 -0000
@@ -317,6 +317,7 @@
     SUBDIR += jamin
     SUBDIR += jid3lib
     SUBDIR += jmusic
+    SUBDIR += jokosher
     SUBDIR += juk
     SUBDIR += juke
     SUBDIR += julius
Index: audio/jokosher/Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: audio/jokosher/Makefile
diff -N audio/jokosher/Makefile
--- /dev/null	1 Jan 1970 00:00:00 -0000
+++ audio/jokosher/Makefile	3 May 2010 09:35:30 -0000
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+# New ports collection makefile for:	jokosher
+# Date created:				13 Aug 2009
+# Whom:					Anonymous
+#
+# $FreeBSD$
+#
+
+PORTNAME=	jokosher
+PORTVERSION=	0.11.5
+CATEGORIES=	audio
+MASTER_SITES=	http://launchpadlibrarian.net/43860543/
+
+MAINTAINER=	swell.k@gmail.com
+COMMENT=	Multi-track non-linear audio editing
+
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/xdg/__init__.py:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-xdg \
+		easy_install:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-setuptools
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=yes
+USE_GSTREAMER=	gnonlin good python
+INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
+
+WANT_GNOME=	yes
+WANT_GSTREAMER=	yes
+
+OPTIONS=	FLAC	"Flac export/import" on \
+		DBUS	"D-Bus extension" on \
+		GCONF	"Gnome Audio playback/record" on \
+		JACK	"Jack audio playback/record" off \
+		LADSPA	"Instrument effects" on \
+		LAME	"Mp3 export" off \
+		MP3	"Mp3 import" off \
+		PROFILES "Gnome Audio Profiles extension" off \
+		PULSE	"PulseAudio playback/record" off \
+		VORBIS	"Ogg Vorbis export/import" on
+#		PIDGIN	"Pidgin status extension" off \
+
+.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
+
+.if defined(WITH_DBUS)
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/dbus/__init__.py:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-dbus
+.endif
+
+.if defined(WITH_GNOME) || ${HAVE_GNOME:Mgnomehier}!=""
+USE_GNOME+=	desktopfileutils gnomehier
+.endif
+
+.if defined(WITH_GNOME) || defined(WITH_PROFILES) \
+	|| ${HAVE_GNOME:Mpygnome2}!=""
+USE_GNOME+=	pygnome2
+.endif
+
+#.if defined(WITH_PIDGIN)
+#WITH_DBUS=	yes
+#RUN_DEPENDS+=	pidgin:${PORTSDIR}/net-im/pidgin
+#.endif
+
+# XXX: need an option?
+.if defined(WITH_OMF) || exists(${LOCALBASE}/bin/scrollkeeper-update)
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	scrollkeeper-update:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/scrollkeeper
+INSTALLS_OMF=	yes
+PLIST_SUB+=	OMF=""
+.else
+PLIST_SUB+=	OMF="@comment "
+.endif
+
+.for plugin in flac gconf jack ladspa lame mp3 pulse vorbis
+. if defined(WITH_${plugin:U})
+   USE_GSTREAMER+= ${plugin}
+. endif
+.endfor
+
+post-patch:	.SILENT
+	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|/usr/share|${PREFIX}/share|g' -e \
+		'\|scrollkeeper-preinstall|s|HELPURI\[fileNum]|"file://" + &|' \
+		${WRKSRC}/bin/${PORTNAME} ${WRKSRC}/${PYSETUP}
+
+.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
Index: audio/jokosher/distinfo
===================================================================
RCS file: audio/jokosher/distinfo
diff -N audio/jokosher/distinfo
--- /dev/null	1 Jan 1970 00:00:00 -0000
+++ audio/jokosher/distinfo	3 May 2010 09:35:38 -0000
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+MD5 (jokosher-0.11.5.tar.gz) = 941b1fac0a93e2963afc192545caf320
+SHA256 (jokosher-0.11.5.tar.gz) = 489e0d06c28c3a11b817e7d6e49573ad4942a9cd426ad62dbbf94f3cca03dedb
+SIZE (jokosher-0.11.5.tar.gz) = 1265726
Index: audio/jokosher/pkg-descr
===================================================================
RCS file: audio/jokosher/pkg-descr
diff -N audio/jokosher/pkg-descr
--- /dev/null	1 Jan 1970 00:00:00 -0000
+++ audio/jokosher/pkg-descr	13 Aug 2009 06:25:19 -0000
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+Jokosher is a simple yet powerful multi-track studio. With it you can
+create and record music, podcasts and more, all from an integrated
+simple environment.
+
+WWW: http://www.jokosher.org/
